sources.title: NCD 220.2 Magnetic Resonance Imaging
sources.note: medicare-coverage-database/view/ncd.aspx?ncdid=177 returned HTTP 503 on fetch; substituted the CMS Manual System transmittal (Pub. 100-03, Transmittal 21) that publishes the same NCD 220.2 section text.

sources.title: NCD 220.1 Computed Tomography
sources.note: medicare-coverage-database/view/ncd.aspx?ncdid=176 returned HTTP 503 on fetch; substituted the CMS Manual System transmittal (Pub. 100-03, Transmittal 85) that publishes the same NCD 220.1 section text.

sources.title: Medicare Program Integrity Manual ch.13 – Reasonable and Necessary Provisions in LCDs
sources.note: Substituted for bp102c16.pdf (Benefit Policy Manual ch.16): ch.16 §20 covers 'not reasonable and necessary' exclusions but its running text does not contain 'investigational' language. Program Integrity Manual ch.13 §13.5.4 is the CMS source that defines 'reasonable and necessary' including the 'not experimental or investigational' criterion.
sources.notes: Curation edit: in the §13.5.3 excerpt, two of the source's bulleted evidentiary-content items ('a complete description of the item or service under review'; 'a narrative that describes the scientific evidence supporting the clinical indications for the item or service') are joined into one prose sentence with 'and'; the item text itself is verbatim.

sources.title: Prior Authorization Process for Certain Hospital Outpatient Department (OPD) Services – Operational Guide
sources.note: The landing page URL in the original brief (research-statistics-data-systems/.../prior-authorization-certain-hospital-outpatient-department-opd-services) now 404s; CMS moved it under data-research/monitoring-programs/... Substituted the OPD Operational Guide PDF linked from the current landing page, which contains the provisional-affirmation and validity-period language directly.
sources.notes: Curation edit history: §2.1 originally condensed the source's service list into one synthesized sentence; replaced (post-review) with the source's verbatim sentences ('CMS added Facet Joint Interventions... This service category will be in addition to the existing list of services requiring prior authorization, which are blepharoplasty, botulinum toxin injection, rhinoplasty, panniculectomy, vein ablation, implanted neurostimulators, and cervical fusion with disc removal.'). In §8.1, three source bullets are joined into prose sentences; bullet text itself is verbatim.

sources.title: Medicare Claims Processing Manual ch.1 (Timely Filing)
sources.notes: Curation edit: the §70.4 excerpt shortens one source sentence by omitting its parenthetical about requests that would have been timely with provider action; both retained halves are verbatim.

sources.title: Medicare Claims Processing Manual (Duplicate Claims / Coding Edits)
sources.notes: Curation edit: §120.2/§120.3 join the source's bulleted duplicate-claim criteria into prose; bullet text is verbatim with only case changes at join seams.

sources.title: Medicare Claims Processing Manual ch.29 (Appeals)
sources.notes: Curation edit: the source's §220 timeframe chart (CHART 1) (redetermination filing and decision deadlines) is presented as prose sentences preserving the chart's exact values (120-day filing limit, 60-day decision timeframe); all other text is verbatim.
